name: BUG-FILING-1
title: add refused as a terminal bug state
description: The bug lifecycle currently has two terminal states: closed (fixed) and reopened->closed. There is no way to express that a bug was explicitly declined (won't-fix, by-design, out-of-scope). A 'refused' state should be added as a third terminal state alongside 'closed'.

history.note: refused terminal state implemented in bug-status.sh; bug-filing v2.0.0
